taco-mix-with-black-beans.name: Taco Mix With Black Beans
instructions: Heat a large skillet over medium heat. Add beef; cook and stir until browned and crumbly, 5 to 7 minutes.
Stir in black beans, salsa, water, and taco seasoning; cook, stirring frequently, until heated through, 5 to 7 minutes.

tadka-focaccia.name: Tadka Focaccia

ingredients.prep: unsalted butter, or additional olive oil

instructions: In a medium bowl, whisk together 2½ cups lukewarm water, 1 (¼-oz.) envelope active dry yeast (2¼ tsp.), and 2 tsp. honey and let it sit for about 5 minutes. After that it should start to look foamy; if it doesn’t, then it’s likely your yeast is dead and you need to get fresh yeast and start over! To the yeast mixture, add 5 cups all-purpose flour, 1 Tbsp. ground turmeric, and 1 Tbsp. salt and mix with a silicone spatula or your hands until a shaggy dough forms.

Pour 4 Tbsp. olive oil into a very large bowl (that can fit in your fridge), add the dough, and move the dough around so that it is coated in the oil. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap or a towel and let it rise in the fridge for at least 8 hours or up to one day. You can also let it rise at room temperature for 3 to 4 hours. The dough should look quite bubbly and have doubled in size.

Using two forks or spoons, gather the edges of the dough farthest away from you in the bowl and lift that edge over toward the center of the dough. Give the bowl a quarter-turn and repeat until all four sides have been folded toward the center. Then repeat this process 3 more times. Pour in 1 Tbsp. olive oil and make sure all of the dough is coated. Let it rise, uncovered, in a warm, dry spot for at least 1½ hours. It should double in size again. It’s ready if you press on the dough with a finger and it slowly springs back.

Preheat the oven to 232°C. Butter a 13x9" baking dish and pour 1 Tbsp. olive oil into the center of the pan. Pour the dough into the pan, stretching it to make sure it touches the edges, and with lightly oiled hands, dimple the focaccia all over. Think of it as putty or Play-Doh and really press down so that you can feel the bottom of the pan.

Melt ¼ cup ghee, unsalted butter, or additional olive oil in a small, heavy-bottomed saucepan. Add 2 tsp. black mustard seeds and let them pop for 10 seconds, then remove the pan from the heat, add 4 tsp. white sesame seeds, 4 or 5 dried red chiles, and 20 to 30 fresh curry leaves, and cover the pan for a minute. Swirl the mixture, then evenly brush it onto the dimpled dough. Drizzle the dough with the remaining ½ Tbsp. olive oil and sprinkle with flaky sea salt. Bake for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden and the bread feels puffy. Cut the focaccia into squares.
Do Ahead: Baked focaccia, wrapped tightly in plastic wrap, will keep in the freezer for up to 1 month.

tahini-simit-cookie-recipe-lezzet.name: Tahini Simit Cookie Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 cup of flour (controllu add, slightly more)

instructions: 1. All materials to a large mixing container and thoroughly ç get a circular mixture.
2. A dough kneading, which gradually adding flour to the mixture, does not stick to the soft and undressing.
3. Budding process for small in a bowl of meat and prepare water string.
4. Raw Herbs and round with your hands.
5. Put the balls &ouml into the mixture with no leakage, then smear the roasted susama and index the oil paper-based oven tray.
6. Repeat this process until the dough is finished.
7. Öpreheated oven at the bottom–high bake about 15 minutes in the setting.
8. Then take the oven to the fan and make the cookies on 120°C at 10 minutes more drying process.
9. Wait and fortune the oven crack after landing.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

taiwanese-minced-pork-sauce.name: Taiwanese Minced Pork Sauce

ingredients.prep: thinly sliced (about 2 cups), plus more for serving

ingredients.item: Shoaxing wine (chinese rice wine) or dry sherry

instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Slice pork belly lengthwise into ½"-thick strips, then slice strips crosswise into ⅛"-thick pieces (or as thin as you can manage). Add pork belly to boiling water and lower heat to maintain a simmer. Cook, skimming any foam that rises to surface, until water is cloudy, about 5 minutes; drain. Set pork belly aside.
Soak mushrooms in 3 cups hot water in a small bowl until mushrooms are soft and water is cool, 20–25 minutes. Remove mushrooms and finely chop. Reserve soaking liquid.

Bring sugar and 2 Tbsp. water to a boil in a medium saucepan over medium-high heat, stirring to dissolve sugar. Once sugar is dissolved, cook, without stirring, until syrup is light copper in color, then mix in oil, scallions, garlic, and rehydrated mushrooms. Cook, stirring often, until scallions are wilted and mixture is fragrant, about 2 minutes. Mix in pork belly, then add wine. Simmer until most of liquid is evaporated, about 1 minute. Add ground bean sauce and mix to coat pork belly, then add soy sauce, reserved mushroom soaking liquid, star anise, and cinnamon sticks. Bring to a simmer. Reduce heat so liquid is at a bare simmer and cook, stirring and pushing down on meat occasionally to break up further, until pork is tender and mixture is thickened, 1½–2 hours. (If the liquid evaporates too quickly, just thin sauce with a little more water.) Skim excess fat from surface of sauce, then pluck out and discard star anise and cinnamon sticks.
Divide rice among bowls; ladle stewed pork over rice. Top each with an egg and some scallions and drizzle with chili oil.

tangy-and-tasty-kale-salad.name: Tangy And Tasty Kale Salad

ingredients.prep: center stems discarded and leaves thinly sliced

instructions: Combine olive oil, lemon juice, mustard, shallot, garlic, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Set dressing aside.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add almonds and cook until just browned, 1 to 2 minutes.
Toss kale, Brussels sprouts, and toasted almonds in a bowl with the dressing. Add Pecorino Romano cheese and serve immediately or allow to sit about 30 minutes for flavors to meld.

tarascan-bean-soup-comedera.name: Tarascan Bean Soup

ingredients.item: 600 gr de jitomates o tomates rojos grandes.
1 cucharadita cafetera de pimienta negra molida

instructions: Comenzaremos por lavar bien los jitomates y los chiles anchos.
We'll have these last ones and we'll cut them and remove the seeds and the white veins and his head. Then we'll cut them into strips.
In the case of tomato, we'll cut them into pieces (they don't have to be regular, because we'll cook them later).
Now, we'll peel the onion and remove the ends and get them into small cubes. We'll also peel his garlic teeth and mince them very finely, or we'll shredder them.
Then we'll warm up a frying pan or big pot with an oil chorrit. That's where we'll fry the chilies for about 5 minutes, with fire between and high, but often remove them so they don't get burned.
Pasado el tiempo indicado, retiraremos los chiles del calor y los reservaremos.
We'll get our cooking back into the frying pan or pot and if necessary we'll add more oil. The next thing we'll do with hot oil, we'll cook garlic and onion with fire between and low.

We'll let them cook about five minutes. Meanwhile, we will use them to pass the baked beans, the chilies we had reserved and the hyMomates - cut up by a kitchen robot, to get a purée (we will reserve some of the fried chilies for decoration).
When onions start to become transparent, we will add purée and fry them.

After five minutes, we will pour the chicken broth and we will season with the pepper, the oregano, the two bay leaves and a touch of salt to taste. We will also add an apezote, well washed, if we have decided to use it.
We'll mix one and let the soup sink. When it's ready, we'll make sure that the fire's very low and we'll let them cook for 20 minutes, covered up.

While the late soup's cooking, we'll use them to prepare tortillas. We'll cut them into strips and warm up a frying pan at medium heat with a little oil. We will fry the strips for a few minutes but without abusing them so they do not get tougher. The goal's just to get them golden.
When we remove tortillas from the frying pan, we will leave them on a plate covered with an absorbing paper sheet to remove excess fat.

Once we have had time to cook soup, we will have to have a good time and if necessary we will have more salt, pepper or herbs. We can also remove the herbs, or otherwise we'll simply be listening to the laurel and the apezote and get them to the plates where we'll serve them.
Guarda algunos trocitos de tortilla para colocarlos en la superficie de la sopa, con los trocitos de chile reservados anteriormente.

tart-with-caramelized-leeks-and-cretan-g.name: Tart With Caramelized Leeks And Cretan Graviera And Sour Cream
tart-with-caramelized-leeks-and-cretan-g.original_name: Εύκολη τάρτα με καραμελωμένα πράσα και γραβιέρα Κρήτης και κρέμα γάλακτος
instructions: We'll need a round tartlet with a detachable base or a 24 cm ring form.
Lightly grease the vessel and spread one leaf of puff pastry making sure it is prominent on the walls.
Cross-dressing, above, the second sheet, making sure the walls are covered. If necessary, cut the pieces that are very prominent and straighten around.
We drill the puff pastry with a fork on the walls. We will do blind baking: put a piece of parchment paper on the leaves and fill with legumes or rice.
Bake in a well preheated oven at 220.3.3., in the resistors, for 20 minutes. Allow the puff pastry to cool for a few minutes. Remove the weight paper.
In the meantime, heat a non-stick pan and add the chopped bacon until it is crispy.
We take it out on Absorbent paper. Wipe the fat from the pan with a little paper, add the olive oil and sauté the leaves in low heat until caramelized and softened, about 12'-15'.
In a bowl, add the eggs, the cream and the thyme. We beat them together.
Place on the baked tart the caramelized leeks and bacon and place on the grill of the oven. Careful not to spill out, pour with the egg mixture and sprinkle with the graviera.
Bake in a preheated oven at 200°C, in the resistors, on the last grill, for about 25′, until the cream is stabilised.
Let the tart cool for 15 minutes and then cut it into pieces.

tempura-green-beans-with-mushroom-salt-a.name: Tempura Green Beans With Mushroom Salt And Shallot Dip

ingredients.prep: 1 coarsely chopped, 1 thinly sliced into rings
white and pale-green parts only, thinly sliced

ingredients.item: Champagne vinegar or white wine vinegar

instructions: Place chopped shallot, scallions, and vinegar in a food processor and season with salt. Process until finely chopped; transfer to a medium bowl. Whisk in mayonnaise, sour cream, buttermilk, and chives; season dip with salt and pepper.

Cook oil and shallot rings in a medium skillet over medium heat, stirring occasionally, until shallots are golden brown, about 4 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer shallots to paper towels to drain; season with salt. Set aside for serving.
DO AHEAD: Dip (without crispy shallots) can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and chill.
Mix salt and 1 Tbsp. porcini powder in a small bowl; set mushroom salt aside.
Fit a large pot with thermometer; pour in oil to measure 2". Heat over medium-high until thermometer registers 375°.
Meanwhile, whisk cornstarch, flour, cornstarch, baking powder, kosher salt, and remaining 2 Tbsp. mushroom powder in a small bowl. Add club soda; whisk until batter is smooth.

Working in batches, dip green beans in batter, letting excess drip back into bowl, and fry, stirring gently with a slotted spoon if green beans stick together, until golden, about 3 minutes per batch. Using a spider or slotted spoon, transfer to paper towels to drain. Sprinkle with mushroom salt.
Top dip with crispy shallots and serve alongside green beans.

tequila-sunrise.name: Tequila Sunrise
instructions:
In a large pitcher, stir together 3 cups fresh orange juice and ⅔ cup tequila. Add ½ tsp. grenadine to each of 6 Collins glasses or other tall glasses, then fill with ice. Divide tequila mixture among the glasses, then garnish each glass with an orange slice.

Editor’s note: This recipe was first printed in the September 1992 issue of ‘Gourmet.’ Head this way for more of our favorite summer cocktails →

thai-soup-teleculinaria.name: Thai Soup
instructions: Put the oil in a pot, take it to the fire and let it warm up. Add the ginger, the herb and the curry and wrap everything. Add the vegetable broth, always stirring.
Add the fish sauce, the chilli and yellow sugar and let cook for 15 minutes.
Add the coconut milk, the kaffir lime leaves and the mushrooms and stir. Finally, add shrimp, water with lime juice and season with salt. Serve immediately.

the-cat-doesnt-sink-lezzet.name: The Cat Doesn't Sink
instructions: 1. Water is boiled in a pot.
2. The mixture of clay flour and corn flour is added to boiling water.
3. Salt and oil are added and mixed.
4. The cheese is sprinkled by rended.
5. Cold water is put on a bowl.
6. Walnut but from dried dough with a spoon; load dough is taken and laid on the tab.

the-new-bees-knees-gin-honey-lavender-co.name: The New Bee's Knees (gin, Honey, Lavender Cocktail)
instructions: Mix hot water and dried lavender blossoms in bowl. Let steep 5 minutes. Whisk in ¼ cup honey. Strain into another bowl. Add 3 tablespoons of the honey syrup, gin, and lemon juice; strain into cocktail shaker with ice. Shake well and strain into 2 chilled Martini glasses.

three-cheese-tortellini-with-walnut-sauc.name: Three Cheese Tortellini With Walnut Sauce
instructions: 1. Remove the flour from a large container.
2. In addition to eggs, olive oil and salt and knead the dough until it begins to be washed.
3. Close the dough with stretch film and rest for 1 hour.
4. Mix cheeses in a large bowl for the inner mortar.
5. Add egg white and taste salt and spices.
6. Take the chopped dough on the countertop.
7. Open thin with the help of a roller and cut 4 cm diameter apartments.
8. Put it up a dessert spoon from the inner mortar you prepare for the middle.
9. Combine the ends back by turning the dough into half circle.
10. Roast the Tortellini in salt boiling water.
11. 11. Take the cream in a saucepan for the sauce.
12. Add walnut, salt and spices and heat.
12. August Add and mix the pasta into sauce pot when you drain the water.
14 July Serve hot by decorating with walnut.

tilapia-foil-packets.name: Tilapia Foil Packets
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Lay 4 sheets of aluminum foil on a work surface.

Place 1 tilapia fillet in the center of each piece of foil, and top with 1/2 tablespoon butter. Sprinkle each fillet with dill, garlic powder, pepper, and salt. Fold foil over top and roll up edges to create a sealed packet. Place packets on a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until fish flakes easily with a fork, about 20 minutes.

toasted-coconut-ice-cream.name: Toasted Coconut Ice Cream
instructions: Preheat oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spread 3 cups flaked coconut onto a baking sheet.
Bake coconut in the preheated oven, turning once, until toasted, 6 to 10 minutes. Cool completely.

Beat sugar and eggs together in a bowl until light and frothy; add cream of coconut and beat well. Add half-and-half and vanilla extract into egg mixture, beating well after each addition. Stir toasted coconut and flaked coconut into half-and-half mixture.
Pour coconut mixture into the bowl of an ice-cream maker. Pour milk into coconut mixture to fill machine to the fill-line, if necessary. Freeze according to the manufacturer's instructions.

tofu-and-tomatoes-with-spinach-and-basil.name: Tofu And Tomatoes With Spinach And Basil

ingredients.item: . soy sauce or vegetable umami seasoning

instructions: Heat a large frying pan or skillet over a medium heat, add half the oil and the salt and spread over the surface of the pan, then fry the tofu for about 8 minutes on each side until golden. Remove from the heat and drain the tofu on paper towels.
In a small bowl, mix together the cider vinegar, vegetarian oyster sauce, soy sauce, and maple syrup as seasoning.

Put the pan back over a medium-high heat, add the remaining oil and brown the shallot, then add the garlic and fry until golden. Add the tomatoes and keep them still for a couple of minutes to brown. Add the fried tofu, then gently turn and stir-fry for a couple of minutes before pouring over the seasoning. Add the spring onions and spinach. Gently stir for another 2 minutes until the spinach wilts.
Garnish with the Thai basil and serve with steamed rice.

tofu-stir-fry.name: Tofu Stir Fry
instructions: Heat peanut oil in a wok over medium-high heat. Crumble the drained tofu and stir-fry until crispy, about 5 minutes. Remove tofu with a slotted spoon and drain on a paper towel.
Add spring onions and frozen vegetables. Stir-fry until crisp and heated throughout, about 5 minutes. Remove from wok and add to the tofu.

Pour black bean sauce and vegetable broth into the wok. Stir together and cook until sauce is hot and has thickened, 3 to 5 minutes. Return tofu and vegetables to the wok; toss well to coat. Serve hot.

tom-yum-goong-soup.name: Tom Yum Goong Soup
instructions: Trim lemongrass and cut into matchstick-sized pieces.

To make stock: Add reserved shrimp heads and shells to 4 cups water in a pot over medium-low heat; simmer for about 20 minutes. Turn off the heat and let stock sit for another 20 minutes before discarding shells.
Add stock, lemongrass, lime leaves, galangal, chile padi, fish sauce, lime juice, sugar, chile paste, and tom yum soup paste to a large soup pot; bring to a boil and cook for 5 minutes.
Lower the heat to medium, then add shrimp, button mushrooms, and straw mushrooms. Simmer until the outsides of shrimp are pink and the centers are opaque, about 10 minutes. Serve immediately.

tomato-soup-with-grilled-cheese-croutons.name: Tomato Soup With Grilled Cheese Croutons
instructions: Make the soup: In a large pot or Dutch oven, melt the olive oil and butter together over medium-high heat. Add the onion and cook, stirring often, until softened and golden, about 7 minutes. Add the garlic and cook, stirring constantly, until aromatic, about 1 minute.

Add the salt, pepper, thyme, red pepper flakes, sugar, tomatoes and their juices, vegetable stock, and basil. Bring to a boil, using a wooden spoon to break up the tomatoes. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 10 minutes.
Remove the basil sprig, then use an immersion blender to blend the soup until smooth. Alternatively, ladle the soup into a standing blender, working in batches, and blend until smooth.
Add the heavy cream to the soup, cover, and cook over low heat for 5 minutes, until warmed through.
Make the croutons: On a cutting board, butter both sides of each slice of bread. Lay the cheese on 2 of the bread slices. Top with the other slices of bread, creating a sandwich.

Heat a large pan over medium-low heat. Once the pan is warm, add the sandwiches and cook until golden brown on the underside, 2–3 minutes. Flip the sandwiches over and continue cooking until the other side golden brown and cheese is melted, about 2 minutes.
Transfer the grilled cheese sandwiches to a cutting board and cut into 1-inch croutons.
Serve the tomato soup topped with the grilled cheese croutons.
Enjoy!

tomatoes-with-anchovy-and-roasted-garlic.name: Tomatoes With Anchovy And Roasted Garlic Vinaigrette
instructions: Halve head of garlic crosswise and wrap in foil, cut side up. Roast in a 450° oven until tender, about 45 minutes. Let cool, then squeeze cloves into a medium bowl. Add anchovies; mash with a fork into paste.

Whisk in chopped parsley, Sherry vinegar, fresh lemon juice, Dijon mustard, sugar, and crushed red pepper flakes, then extra-virgin olive oil and vegetable oil. Whisk until combined. Season with salt and pepper. Serve over tomato slices or peeled, seeded cucumber slices.

top-banana.name: Top Banana
instructions: Fill a pint glass partway with ice. Add lime juice, crème de banana, and beer. Stir gently to combine. Garnish with a lime wedge.

traditional-couscous-or-tabbouleh-salad-.name: Traditional Couscous Or Tabbouleh Salad, Recipe
traditional-couscous-or-tabbouleh-salad-.original_name: Ensalada de cuscús tradicional o tabulé, receta fácil

ingredients.item: 4 hojas de menta o hierbabuena fresca

instructions: We're gonna start by cooking the cuscus. That way, once I'm ready, we can get him cold. To this end, we will heat up a cup and a half of water, that's the same amount of couscus we'll use (we can actually figure out an additional finger, just in case it evapates while warming it).
When the water's hot, add a touch of salt and pepper and an olive oil chorrit. Fold well.
Seat the cuscus into a bowl and pour hot water onto top. Cover and let the cuscus absorb the liquid.
Wait three minutes and then put the spoonful butter onto the hot cuscus. Cover to concentrate the heat and wait a few minutes for its frying.
Fold again after this time and mix with the help of a spoon or kitchen spatula. Then let the cuscus cool (clear) while we move to care about other ingredients.
Ahora vamos a lavar bien el perejil. Lo enjuagaremos bien con agua fresca, e incluso podemos dejarlo remojando en un recipiente con agua y un chorro de vinagre, durante unos cinco minutos.
Luego, vamos a escurrirlo muy bien, y con un cuchillo bien afilado, vamos a picarlo muy finamente sobre una tabla de cocina. Entonces, lo reservaremos.

We'll come to care about our other scented weed: mint or peppermint. We will also wash the leaves well (I would rather soak them with vinegar water as well as parsley) and then scold them and mingle them.
En el caso del tomate rojo, lo lavaremos bien y lo picaremos en cuadritos.
We will also peel the onion or onions, and we will mince them very finely.

Once the cuscus has been cold, we will start to mix the salad ingredients. We'll put all the vegetables in a salad and add the cuscus as well. Can you help with a fork to separate the grains from the latter.
Mezcla bien todos los ingredientes.

Then she pits a few lemons and squeezes her juice onto the salad (but removes the seeds). Add an additional touch of salt and pepper and an olive oil chorrit. Mix everything and try the tabular. Decide then if you want to squeeze the third lemon to suit the salad (the necessary amount of lemons may vary depending on their size). It also fixes the date, if necessary, with a little more salt and / or pepper. In any case, mix back very well.
Instead, let the salad refrigerate before serving it, for a more refreshing effect.

traditional-italian-porchetta-pequerecet.name: Traditional Italian Porchetta

ingredients.item: 2 kg de panceta de cerdo abierta en libro
1,2 kg de lomo de cerdo (para el relleno interior)
12 g de sal fina (una cucharada rasa)
8 g de pimienta negra molida (1 cucharadita colmada)
Cuerda de cocina suficiente para atar el rollo
Un chorrito extra de aceite de oliva para la superficie

instructions: The first thing to do is to prepare the adobo. In a large bowl we mix 1 tablespoon of salt, 1 tablespoon filled with black pepper, 4 minced garlic teeth, 1 tablespoon of granate ham, 1 tablespoon of fresh minced rosemary, 1 tablespoon of minced sage, 1 tablespoon of fraked lemon skin, 40 million extra virgin olive oil and 80 million dry white wine. It's got to be quite moist and easy to extend.

We place the pork pantet with the skin back onto the table. We smash her with our hands so that she's more uniform and we share the dough of the adobo throughout the surface and get well at the edges.
On top we put the 1,2 kg loin, that will play core, and we press a little to get it settled.
Now play roll. We start from the long side and we form a tight cylinder without a rush, making sure that the back remains focused.

Once we have him, we tie him with a kitchen string every 3-4 cm, as with a traditional Roast. There's no trick here: the better tied up, the more uniform the cooking and the more beautiful it will be at cutting.

Once we have the porchetta tied up, we cover it with paper aluminum, sealing the edges well so that steam remains inside. That helps a great deal: the flesh gets tender without drying and all the fat melts slowly, and that's what we want.

We put it into the oven at 150 ° C for 3 hours with the bottom fluid (a mixture of 200 ml of white wine and 150 ml of water) to maintain moisture. If during cooking we see that the bottom remains dry, we add some more water.

After that time, we carefully remove the aluminium (a steam that burns out, so care), we put up the oven at 200ºC and let it get dark from 25 to 30 minutes, till the skin gets crispy. Each oven is a world, so here, let's be guided by the light: when the surface has that golden tone and crosses by touching it, you'll know it's ready.

Once out of the oven, we let her rest at least 20- 30 minutes. It's an important step because the flesh sits and then cuts far better. If we try to cut it just out of the oven, it crumbles a little and lose juices.

traditional-portuguese-green-broth-peque.name: Traditional Portuguese Green Broth

ingredients.item: 150 g de berza o kale cortada en tiras muy finas
3 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra

instructions: Pelamos las 500 g de patatas, 1 cebolla grande y 2 dientes de ajo.
Cortamos las patatas en trozos medianos y la col gallega o berza (unos 150 g) en tiras muy finas, casi como hilos.
In a pot, we heated 3 tablespoons of extra virgin olive oil and we soften onion and garlic for a few minutes, until they start to get light.

We add the potatoes, remove a few minutes to get them impregnated from the oil and put about 1.5 liters of water or vegetable stock. We put a pint of salt and let them cook at medium heat for about 25 minutes, till the potatoes are soft.
We cross everything with the mixer till we get a soft and clumsy cream. If we get too thick, we add some more hot water.
We put the cut cabbage into thin strips and cook about 10 more minutes, till she's tender but still with some texture.
Meanwhile, we cut 100 g of Portuguese chorizo into slices and put it into a separate frying pan for a few minutes, to let go of the fat. We put him into the green broth in the last few minutes.
Servimos el caldo verde caliente, con las rodajas de chorizo por encima y un chorrito de aceite de oliva virgen extra.

tripitas-tacos-recipe-comedera.name: Tripitas Tacos Recipe
instructions: Lava perfectamente la tripa de res por dentro y por fuera.
A pot adds water and puts the meat with some salt, onion, laurel and garlic and we leave to boil till the meat is perfectly cooked about 90-120 minutes.
Once the gut has been boiled, it drains and pits into pieces that are not very small.
A saucer adds butter and after melting put the tripits to fry and expects another 15 minutes.
Depende de tu gusto el tiempo de este proceso, si es muy frita o ligeramente frita.
Warm up some corn tortillas and prepare traditional re gut tacos with a rich juicy red salsa, onion and cilantro finely minced.

tropical-cobb-salad.name: Tropical Cobb Salad

ingredients.prep: boneless chicken thighs, cut into  0.75" pieces

ingredients.item: Torn little gem or green lettuce

ingredients.prep: mild red pepper flakes, and basil and/or mint (for serving)

instructions: Heat 2 Tbsp. oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium. Add garlic and cook, tossing occasionally, until golden brown all over, about 5 minutes. Increase heat to medium-high. Season chicken with kosher salt and add to skillet. Cook, tossing occasionally, until chicken is golden brown and nearly cooked through, about 3 minutes. Remove from heat and add vadouvan. Toss several times and let chicken sit in skillet until cooked through, about 1 minute longer. Transfer to a plate and let cool slightly.

Whisk lime juice and remaining 5 Tbsp. oil in a small bowl; season with kosher salt. Arrange lettuce, chicken, avocado, mango, onion, and tomatoes on a platter. Drizzle with dressing. Top with sea salt, red pepper flakes, and herbs.

tulum-cheese-stuffed-tomatoes-lezzet.name: Tulum Cheese Stuffed Tomatoes
instructions: 1. Wash and remove tomatoes.
2. Fresh onion and yellowish after washing and sorting the fine coast.
3. After washing pepper and removing seeds, eat fine.
4. Blend the overall cheese in a deep bowl with onion, garlic, spike pepper, walnut and pepper.
5. Add and mix olive oil.
6. Share your prepared cheese tribute into tomatoes and serve.
7.  Afiyet olsun.
8. What are the Pinpoints of Tulum Cheese Tomato Treaty Recipe? Take care of the fact that the tomatoes you will use in the recipe are appropriate size.
9. You can add a lot of sulphurs and parsley to the cheese of Tulum to be filled with fine thin.
10. Take care of not too much when filling the cheese mortar into tomatoes.
11. 11. In this way you can avoid stone1 How many Calorie to Do Porsion Tulum Cheese Tomatoes? A portion of the dried tomatoes is about 200 calories.
12. Within one serving, there are 2 stuff.

tuna-and-spinach-tray-teleculinaria.name: Tuna And Spinach Tray
instructions: Descasque e pique a cebola e o dente de alho e aloure-os num pouco de azeite. Acrescente os espinafres e tempere com um pouco de sal e pimenta. Deixe cozinhar e reserve.
Spill the tuna slightly and then mix it in the previous preparation. In a bowl, beat the eggs with milk, season with salt and pepper and reserve.

At the bottom of an oven container, spread the mixture of tuna and spinach and cover with the egg preparation. Sprinkle with grated cheese and bring it to the oven, preheated at 180°C, for about 25 minutes.

tuna-bolognese-recipe-teleculinaria.name: Tuna Bolognese - Recipe
instructions: Descasque a cenoura, a cebola e o alho e retire os filamentos do aipo. Pique tudo finamente e leve a refogar, num tacho com um fio de azeite.
Add the drained tuna and cook for a few minutes. Water with the white wine, add the tomato and season with salt and pepper. Mix, cover and let cook, in low heat, until you figure it out.

On the other hand, it cooks the dough in abundant water seasoned with salt, according to the time indicated in the package. Drain, wrap it with the tuna sauce and serve sprinkled with chopped parsley.

tuna-burger-in-bolo-do-caco-teleculinari.name: Tuna Burger In Bolo Do Caco
tuna-burger-in-bolo-do-caco-teleculinari.original_name: Hambúrguer de atum em bolo do caco

ingredients.item: 1 saqueta  fermento de padeiro seco (11 g)
Alface e rodelas de tomate q.b.

instructions: Prepare the bread: dissolve the yeast in warm water. Then add the cooked sweet potato, previously reduced to puree, flour and pinch of salt and mix well. If necessary, add a little more flour in order to obtain a fairly homogeneous mass.

Put the dough in a bowl and let it leave till it gets twice the volume. At that point, divide the dough into six equal parts, mold it into balls and flatten it. Have a tray sprinkled with flour and leave another 20 minutes in a warm place.
Then take a non-stick pan to the fire and let it warm well. Color the loaves on both sides until they are cooked and golden. Remove and reserve.

Prepare the burgers: place in a chipper the tuna loin, the onion, peeled and cut into pieces and the pepper, clean and cut into pieces. Season with salt and pepper and crush. Transfer to a bowl, add the egg and mix well.

Divide the previous preparation into six equal portions and mold them into hamburgers. Color them on both sides in a frying pan with some olive oil. Open the loaves in half and stuff them with a tomato slice and a lettuce leaf. Serve right away.

turkey-stuffed-with-chestnuts-recipe-com.name: Turkey Stuffed With Chestnuts Recipe
turkey-stuffed-with-chestnuts-recipe-com.original_name: Receta de pavo relleno de castañas

ingredients.item: 500 g of baked and peeled chestnuts
200 gr de carne molida de cerdo
Nuez moscada y canela en polvo  (al gusto)

instructions: It purifies the oven at 180 and 3.

Clean the turkey and dry it with absorbing paper. Fits butter throughout the surface and season with salt, pepper, rosemary and thyme. Add the chopped garlic into the turkey cavity to give a special smell.
In a large frying pan, melt butter and add onion and garlic. Cooking till they're clear.

Add ground pork and cook till golden. It incorporates apple, chestnuts, ground bread, white wine, nutmeg and cinnamon. Cooking at medium heat till the liquid has evaporate and the ingredients are well integrated. Retification of salt and pepper.
Carefully fill the turkey with the chestnut mix. Close the cavity with kitchen thread to keep the pilling in place while cooking.
Coloca el pavo en una bandeja para hornear y vierte una taza de vino blanco o caldo de pollo en el fondo de la bandeja.
Bake the turkey for 3.5 to 4 hours (about 40-45 minutes per kilo), bathing it every hour with its own juices or with more white wine to keep the meat juicy.
To check that the turkey is ready, make sure that the internal temperature of the flesh reaches 74 ″ 3 ″ at the thigh's thigh.
